additive.smoothed_formula: corrected_eta = estimate_time + (w * time_bin_residual + (1 - w) * global_residual), w=n/(n+k)

ratio.smoothed_formula: corrected_eta = estimate_time * (w * time_bin_ratio + (1 - w) * global_ratio), w=n/(n+k)

affine.smoothed_formula: corrected_eta = (w * a_time_bin + (1 - w) * a_global) * estimate_time + (w * b_time_bin + (1 - w) * b_global), w=n/(n+k)

log_ratio.smoothed_formula: corrected_eta = estimate_time * exp(w * time_bin_log_ratio + (1 - w) * global_log_ratio), w=n/(n+k)
